unsubscribed OR complaint OR bounce → score = 0

, otherwise your CRM will get messy later.

👉 This is NOT relationship — this is company classification.
exact dropdown config + validation rules for frontend
how to tag the leads from sales team , like how many accoutns or leads they added today?
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS created_by_user_id UUID,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS created_by_email TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS created_by_name TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW();

I’ll consolidate everything into one clean CRM Phase 1 document, including the updated stage lifecycle, webhook/API specs, and n8n workflow list.
→ Supabase PostgreSQL + Supabase Auth + Row Level Security
Build a CRM system that supports:
directly. Create a profile table linked to Supabase Auth.
user_id UUID PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
role TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (role IN ('admin', 'sales')),
lead_id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
activity_id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
lead_id UUID REFERENCES leads(lead_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
template_id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
to store relationship or company type.
All sources must pass through the same ingestion pipeline.
4. company_domain only if no contact email exists
Do Not Contact / complaint / hard bounce
reason = 'Suppressed due to unsubscribe, complaint, or hard bounce';
Unsubscribed, complaint, hard bounce, or manual block
→ stage can remain new OR become recommended
ALTER TABLE leads ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE lead_activities ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
CREATE POLICY "Sales can view own leads"
CREATE POLICY "Sales can update own leads"
Sales Can Insert Leads They Create
ORDER BY score DESC, last_updated DESC
18. Mass Email Campaigns to CRM Leads
Campaigns can be sent to CRM leads.
ORDER BY score DESC, last_updated DESC
Frontend should use Supabase SDK for:
Use n8n for business logic and automation.
Internal scheduled workflow, no frontend call required.
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_leads_owner ON leads(lead_owner_email);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_leads_score ON leads(score DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_leads_stage ON leads(stage);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_leads_email ON leads(email);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_leads_domain ON leads(company_domain);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_leads_daily ON leads(is_daily_recommended);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_leads_created_at ON leads(created_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_leads_last_updated ON leads(last_updated DESC);
Use filters by stage, category, owner
Avoid one DB write per imported row
Do not poll Gmail faster than 15 minutes
n8n instance setup, Google Sheets CRM structure, Gmail OAuth connections, domain auth (SPF/DKIM/DMARC)
WF-2: Apollo enrichment + Apify hiring signals + AI categorization
WF-3: Scoring rules + WF-4: Daily shortlist
WF-5: Full outreach sequence with personalization, follow-ups, opt-out
Dashboard, testing, warmup initiation, edge case handling
